signals.headline: Cavaliers defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, take 2-0 series lead in Eastern Conference first round** | NO | HIGH
signals.raw:
Cavaliers defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, take 2-0 series lead in Eastern Conference first round** | NO | HIGH  
The Cleveland Cavaliers won Monday's game behind 30 points from Donovan Mitchell, 28 from James Harden, and 25 from Evan Mobley, never trailing and extending their playoff win streak against Toronto to 12 straight games[1][3][4]. Game 3 is scheduled for Thursday, April 23, at 8:00 PM
